description: Developed and maintained scalable full-stack web applications using React.js, Laravel, Node.js, Go, and MySQL, ensuring high performance and clean modular architecture.
Designed Courier Management Systems tracking shipment lifecycles and rates, integrating logistics carrier APIs like DHL, Aramex, and UPS.
Built Travel Booking modules with Sabre, Amadeus, and Mondee APIs alongside high-performance microservices using Golang.
Created custom CRM communication systems integrating WhatsApp Business Cloud, Botpress AI agents, and ElevenLabs voice AI for chat automation.
Developed and maintained a Hotel Management System using Laravel and MySQL for bookings, room management, and billing.
Built secure RESTful APIs to support smooth communication between system modules.
Integrated third-party services such as Firebase, SMS gateways, and WhatsApp APIs for notifications.
Designed and optimized MySQL database structures and queries to improve scalability.
